title: Li Auto Q2 2023 Earnings Preview
text: The consensus EPS Estimate is $0.19 (+1050.0% Y/Y) and the consensus Revenue Estimate is $3.8B (+192.3% Y/Y). Over the last 2 years, LI has beaten EPS estimates 63% of the time and has beaten revenue estimates 75% of the time. In the last 90 days there were three Q2'23 EPS upside revisions and zero downside revisions. Revenue estimates went up three times compared to one revenue downside revision. Li Auto delivered 86,533 electric vehicles in the second-quarter, showing a Q/Q increase of 65%. Given that Li Auto's delivery growth accelerated in both June and July 2023, analysts believe the electric vehicle company could guide for 100-110 thousand deliveries for the current quarter. The earnings report was scheduled for August 8, 2023.
